/toge /ci3 1 なにこれ……防御壁？
このままじゃ近づけない……！

/toge /ci1 2 でも、上からなら……いける？
どうにかして、壁の中に
入る手段は……！

/toge /ci3 1 What's this? A barricade?
We can't get any closer like this.

/toge /ci1 2 Maybe if we try from above? Hmm.
Let's find a way to get through this wall!
